description_long: This is a large, modern house set on a landscaped lot with mature trees and a paved driveway leading to a garage. The structure features a mix of brick and white exterior finishes, with flat and slightly angled roof sections, and multiple large windows that provide ample natural light. The property includes a fenced backyard with a pool, visible from the rear and side views, and a variety of greenery that adds privacy and aesthetic appeal. The front facade is defined by a prominent entryway with steps, a covered porch, and a combination of rectangular and arched windows. The house appears to have two main stories, with a rooftop terrace or deck area. The overall design is contemporary, blending geometric forms with functional outdoor spaces.
description: A spacious modern house with brick and white finishes, large windows, flat roofs, a garage, and landscaped grounds with mature trees and a backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, driveway, garage, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, garage, and the fence enclosing the property.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by tall trees, with glimpses of the backyard pool and outdoor living areas.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the brick exterior, side yard, and additional entry points.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some arched elements
attribute_entryway_design: Prominent front entry with steps, a covered porch, and a modern door flanked by windows
